const.canonicalMessage: Source-family package compiler hash does not match the checked implementation.
const.suggestedAction: Review compiler changes explicitly or restore the checked compiler implementation before packaging proof continues.

const.canonicalMessage: Source-family package manifest or source bytes do not match the checked bundle.
const.suggestedAction: Restore the checked bundle bytes or update the manifest through explicit review.

const.canonicalMessage: Source-family package attempts to expand the accepted P2 component or capability boundary.
const.suggestedAction: Limit the package to Button and InLineAlert or add a separate ingestion proof before expanding authority.

const.canonicalMessage: Source-family package preserves a non-executable team-owned exception for owner review.
const.suggestedAction: Keep the exception outside the catalog until the declared owner completes review.

const.canonicalMessage: The unchanged source-conformance compiler did not produce a passing packaged-bundle result.
const.suggestedAction: Inspect the captured compiler diagnostics and correct the checked bundle without adding family-specific compiler logic.

const.canonicalMessage: Source-family packaging evidence hash does not match its checked inputs or generated artifacts.
const.suggestedAction: Regenerate the packaging proof from checked compiler, bundle, fixture, and upstream bytes.
